governance_readiness.baseline_update_policy: Regenerate .sentrux/baseline.json only after reviewing intentional architecture changes.

evidence: CI command after baseline commit: sentrux gate
findings.smallest_safe_first_cut: Run `sentrux gate --save`, review the generated baseline, and commit .sentrux/baseline.json.
findings.summary: Sentrux has no saved baseline, so pre-merge gate comparisons are not enforceable yet.

setup_steps: Create .sentrux/rules.toml with project exclusions and the first enforced concept or module contract.
Run `sentrux gate --save` once the current repository state is acceptable.
Commit .sentrux/rules.toml and .sentrux/baseline.json, then run `sentrux gate` in CI before merge.
